title: A Night of Passion and Love
overview: Two strangers meet in a nightclub and end up spending the night together in a love hotel. Roberto has just came out of a failed relationship and Paula wants to enjoy her last moments of freedom before getting married the next day. After making a pact of sincerity, they spend a night filled with interesting conversations and passion.
